config.vibrancy.title: Vibrancy Config
config.vibrancy.general.modEnabled.toolt: Enables or disables all Vibrancy lighting effects. Disabling saves GPU resources and reverts to vanilla lighting.
config.vibrancy.general.asyncThreads.too: Number of CPU threads used to build shadow data in the background. Higher values speed up shadow generation when loading new chunks, at the cost of more CPU usage.
config.vibrancy.general.limitLightBright: Limits how bright Vibrancy lights can make each pixel.
Better for videos in some situations, but loses some detail and quality.
Global multiplier for all light flickering, set to 0 to disable them.
config.vibrancy.specularReflections.enab: Enables specular (shiny) highlights on surfaces lit by block lights. Requires reflection map textures per block; blocks without them will not show highlights.
config.vibrancy.specularReflections.stre: Multiplier for specular highlight intensity. Higher values make surfaces appear shinier and more mirror-like.
config.vibrancy.specularReflections.expo: Controls how tightly focused specular highlights are. Higher values produce a smaller, sharper hotspot. Lower values spread the highlight across a wider area.
config.vibrancy.entityShadows.enabled.to: Enables dynamic shadows cast by moving entities (mobs, players, items). These are recalculated each frame and increase GPU load near lights with many nearby entities.
config.vibrancy.entityShadows.blockEntit: Enables shadows from block entities (chests, signs, item frames, etc.). Slightly more expensive than regular block shadows since they are rebuilt each frame.
config.vibrancy.entityShadows.distance.t: The distance from camera in chunks where lights can have entity shadows. Reducing this improves performance in areas with many lights.
The maximum number of lights that can have entity shadows, prioritising lights closest to the camera. Set to 0 to disable while keeping the setting easily re-enabled.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.en: Enables raytraced block lights with dynamic per-light shadows. Disabling removes ray-traced shadows and saves significant GPU time.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.ma: The maximum number of block lights that will be rendered, closest lights first.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.br: Linear multiplier for the brightness of all block lights.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.sh: The maximum radius (in blocks) from each block light where blocks will cast shadows.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.ma: The maximum number of lights that use composite rendering, fixing the side of grass blocks not looking right.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.raytraced.fr: Skips rendering lights that are outside the camera's field of view. Improves performance when many lights are behind the player with no visual quality loss. Shadows are still updated off-screen so they appear instantly when you look back.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.subtle.rende: Maximum radius in chunks around the player where subtle (non-raytraced) block lights are visible. Lower values improve performance in dense builds.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.subtle.brigh: Linear multiplier for the brightness of all block lights.
config.vibrancy.blockLights.subtle.culli: Same Block Type - If all neighbors are the same block type as the light, get rid of the light
Solid - If all neighbors are a full solid block, get rid of the light
Not Air - If all neighbors are not air, get rid of the light
config.vibrancy.skyLights.shadow_distanc: The distance (in chunks) from the camera where shadows are calculated
config.vibrancy.skyLights.brightness.too: Linear multiplier for sky light brightness. Does not affect shadow quality or coverage area.
config.vibrancy.skyLights.shadow_map_pow: Controls the depth precision curve of the sky light shadow map. Higher values concentrate precision near the camera for sharper close-up shadows, but distant shadows may clip or disappear.
config.vibrancy.skyLights.translucent_en: Enables colored light filtering through translucent blocks (e.g. stained glass) for sky light shadows. Disabling improves performance at the cost of translucent blocks casting solid shadows.
error.vibrancy.no_ssbos: Vibrancy requires the GPU extension GL_ARB_shader_storage_buffer_object (included in OpenGL 4.3), which your system does not support. This can typically be solved by updating your GPU drivers. The mod has been disabled.
error.vibrancy.no_ssbos_mac: Vibrancy requires the GPU extension GL_ARB_shader_storage_buffer_object (included in OpenGL 4.3), which MacOS does not support, and there is no way to fix it. The mod has been disabled.
error.vibrancy.amd: Vibrancy currently does not work with AMD GPU drivers for an unknown reason. I can't debug this since I don't have a device with AMD drivers. If you are a rendering expert with AMD drivers and would like to help this get resolved, please join the discord server and notify me.
loading.vibrancy.tip1: To get faster loads, increase the Async Threads option in Vibrancy config.
loading.vibrancy.tip2: (this does use more of your CPU and might lag other apps while lights are generating)
